name: Turkey Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a skillet, cook turkey, onion, and garlic until the meat is browned.
3. Drain off excess fat.
4. Stir in flour, green pepper, corn, mushrooms, tomato sauce, chopped tomatoes, chili powder, and Italian seasoning.
5. Cook and stir until thickened, bubbly, and vegetables are tender.
6. Spoon about 1/3 cup of the filling into each tortilla.
7. Top each tortilla with 2 tablespoons of cheese.
8. Bake, uncovered, for 15 to 25 minutes.
